move_black_garment_to_upper_left.query: a worker lifts a black garment with both hands and moves it to the upper-left side of the worktable

spread_garment_in_front_of_sewing_machin.query: a worker pulls a black garment toward themselves with both hands and spreads it on the table in front of the sewing machine

align_garment_edge_layers.query: a worker pinches the edge of a black garment with both hands and aligns the overlapping fabric layers

feed_garment_edge_under_presser_foot.query: a worker feeds the aligned edge of a black garment under the sewing machine presser foot
